actors.text: One-sample t-test results: t = -2.45, p = 0.018, alpha = 0.05. What is the conclusion?
p < alpha, reject H0; convincing evidence mu < 12
p < alpha, accept H0; cups are fine
actors.reflection: We never ACCEPT the null. If p < alpha, we REJECT H0 -- and even then we only have evidence against H0, not proof of any claim.

actors.text: p > alpha, fail to reject H0
actors.reflection: p = 0.018 is LESS than alpha = 0.05. Compare carefully: 0.018 < 0.05 means we reject H0.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
